Class DefaultMcpSyncRequestContext

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.context.DefaultMcpSyncRequestContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
McpRequestContextTypes<io.modelcontextprotocol.server.McpSyncServerExchange>, McpSyncRequestContext
public final class DefaultMcpSyncRequestContext extends Object implements McpSyncRequestContext
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Sebastien Deleuze
